steps.vulnerability_name: Create mechanic URL validator with allowlist and IP checks
steps.description: Reject unsafe schemes, userinfo URLs, non-allowlisted hosts, and private/link-local resolutions.
Whitelist outbound destinations explicitly in workshop settings.
Use validator and return HTTP 400 on unsafe URL input; disable redirects.

verification.description: Non-allowlisted external URL must be rejected
Metadata IP and credential-embedded URLs must be rejected
verification.curl: curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' -X POST http://localhost:8888/workshop/api/merchant/contact_mechanic -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{"mechanic_code":"TRAC_JHN","problem_details":"test","vin":"4AGRNV6392LZ82YUR","repeat_request_if_failed":false,"number_of_repeats":1,"mechanic_api":"https://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/"}' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n' -X POST http://localhost:8888/workshop/api/merchant/contact_mechanic -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{"mechanic_code":"TRAC_JHN","problem_details":"test","vin":"4AGRNV6392LZ82YUR","repeat_request_if_failed":false,"number_of_repeats":1,"mechanic_api":"https://api.partner-mechanic.example@attacker.example/"}'
